description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat roof and a simple, rectangular layout. The exterior features red brick walls, large rectangular windows, and a prominent bay window section that adds architectural interest. The house includes a garage with a visible door, a main entry door, and several interior rooms visible through the windows, including a dining area with a round table. The window arrangement is mostly asymmetrical, with a mix of standard and bay windows providing natural light. The main entryway is understated, with a plain door and no porch or decorative columns. The overall design is functional and modern, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A single-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a bay window, and an attached garage. The design is modern and functional, with asymmetrical window placement and a simple entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and side of the house, highlighting the bay window, main entry door, and dining area inside.
description_view_1: This view displays the long side of the house with multiple windows and the bay window section, emphasizing the brick exterior.
description_view_2: This view reveals the garage door, rear windows, and a secondary entry, with a clear look at the flat roof and back wall.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the rear and side of the house, showing the bay window, back door, and a more private side of the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the brick facade
